## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes locally
- [ ] `cargo check -p localmessenger_tauri_client` passes
- [ ] `cd apps/tauri-client && npx tsc --noEmit` passes (if TypeScript was changed)
- [ ] New code is covered by tests (or I explained why tests aren't applicable)
- [ ] I have updated documentation if necessary
- [ ] I have read the [threat model](docs/threat-model.md) and my changes do not introduce new security risks (or I described the risk and mitigation)
